verses.text: Every high priest is taken from among men, able to have compassion, since he too is 'compassed with infirmity,' offering for his own sins. Fellow-feeling. The earthly priest shared the people's weakness.

Every high priest is taken from among men, able to have compassion, since he too is 'compassed with infirmity,' offering for his own sins. Fellow-feeling. The earthly priest shared the people's weakness.

Every high priest is taken from among men, able to have compassion, since he too is 'compassed with infirmity,' offering for his own sins. Fellow-feeling. The earthly priest shared the people's weakness.
No man takes this honour but he that is called of God; so Christ was called, 'a priest for ever after the order of Melchisedec.' Divine call. Christ's priesthood is appointed by God Himself.
No man takes this honour but he that is called of God; so Christ was called, 'a priest for ever after the order of Melchisedec.' Divine call. Christ's priesthood is appointed by God Himself.
No man takes this honour but he that is called of God; so Christ was called, 'a priest for ever after the order of Melchisedec.' Divine call. Christ's priesthood is appointed by God Himself.

In the days of His flesh He offered prayers 'with strong crying and tears'; 'though he were a Son, yet learned he obedience,' and became 'the author of eternal salvation.' Obedient Saviour. Through suffering He won our salvation.

In the days of His flesh He offered prayers 'with strong crying and tears'; 'though he were a Son, yet learned he obedience,' and became 'the author of eternal salvation.' Obedient Saviour. Through suffering He won our salvation.

In the days of His flesh He offered prayers 'with strong crying and tears'; 'though he were a Son, yet learned he obedience,' and became 'the author of eternal salvation.' Obedient Saviour. Through suffering He won our salvation.
Called of God a high priest, yet they are 'dull of hearing,' needing milk when they should teach. Spiritual sloth. Slow learners must be roused to grow.
Called of God a high priest, yet they are 'dull of hearing,' needing milk when they should teach. Spiritual sloth. Slow learners must be roused to grow.
Called of God a high priest, yet they are 'dull of hearing,' needing milk when they should teach. Spiritual sloth. Slow learners must be roused to grow.
Milk is for babes; 'strong meat belongeth to them that are of full age,' whose senses are 'exercised to discern.' Grow up. Maturity comes by practised use of the truth.
